messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Write a python-pptx script creating a 9-slide corporate presentation for School Board Superintendents proposing the District Budget. Use professional structured bullet points and financial tables. Save as "District_Budget.pptx". All text must be in English, formatted to fit a 16:9 Widescreen slide size orientation. Do not use any external APIs, web scraping, or internet access to fetch data or assets; all content and logic must be generated purely within the script. When creating charts, you must strictly use XL_CHART_TYPE from the library; do not import or use ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Before setting text on a title shape, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None first to prevent errors. Your response must be structured with distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. All Python code must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


# --- Constants ---
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

PRIMARY_BLUE = RGBColor(0x1B, 0x4F, 0x8A)
SECONDARY_TEAL = RGBColor(0x2E, 0x8B, 0x57)
ACCENT_GOLD = RGBColor(0xD9, 0xA0, 0x2C)
DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(0x33, 0x33, 0x33)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(0x66, 0x66, 0x66)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xF5, 0xF5, 0xF5)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
SOFT_BLUE_BG = RGBColor(0xE8, 0xEE, 0xF4)

FONT_TITLE = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
FONT_HEADER = "Arial"

MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
CONTENT_WIDTH = SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT - MARGIN_RIGHT
CARD_PADDING = Inches(0.2)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    h = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex=WHITE):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex) if isinstance(color_hex, str) else color_hex


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False,
                 color=DARK_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_BODY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.color.rgb = color
    p.font.name = font_name
    p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color=WHITE,
             border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    tf.margin_left = Inches(0.15)
    tf.margin_right = Inches(0.15)
    tf.margin_top = Inches(0.12)
    tf.margin_bottom = Inches(0.12)

    if title:
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.text = title
        p.font.size = Pt(13)
        p.font.bold = True
        p.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
        p.font.name = FONT_HEADER
        p.space_after = Pt(6)

    if body:
        p2 = tf.add_paragraph()
        p2.text = body
        p2.font.size = Pt(10.5)
        p2.font.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        p2.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, text, font_size=11, color=ACCENT_GOLD):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, Inches(0.08), Inches(0.35))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
    shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.15), top - Inches(0.02), Inches(4), Inches(0.35),
                 text, font_size=font_size, bold=True, color=color, font_name=FONT_HEADER)


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total_slides):
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, SLIDE_HEIGHT - Inches(0.28), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.25),
                 f"District Budget Proposal  |  Slide {slide_num} of {total_slides}",
                 font_size=9, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xCC, 0xCC, 0xCC)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + height / 2 - Inches(0.15),
                     width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), "Image Placeholder",
                     font_size=10, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_table(slide, rows, cols, data, left, top, width, height):
    table_shape = slide.shapes.add_table(rows, cols, left, top, width, height)
    table = table_shape.table

    for i in range(rows):
        for j in range(cols):
            cell = table.cell(i, j)
            cell.text = str(data[i][j]) if data and i < len(data) and j < len(data[i]) else ""
            for paragraph in cell.text_frame.paragraphs:
                paragraph.font.size = Pt(10)
                paragraph.font.name = FONT_BODY
                paragraph.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER

    # Style header row
    for j in range(cols):
        cell = table.cell(0, j)
        cell.fill.solid()
        cell.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
        for p in cell.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.font.color.rgb = WHITE
            p.font.bold = True
            p.font.size = Pt(10.5)

    return table_shape


def add_bullet_list(slide, left, top, width, height, items, font_size=12):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    for idx, item in enumerate(items):
        if idx == 0:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p = tf.add_paragraph()
        p.text = f"• {item}"
        p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
        p.font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
        p.font.name = FONT_BODY
        p.space_after = Pt(4)


def add_numbered_list(slide, left, top, width, height, items, font_size=12):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    for idx, item in enumerate(items):
        if idx == 0:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p = tf.add_paragraph()
        p.text = f"{idx + 1}. {item}"
        p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
        p.font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
        p.font.name = FONT_BODY
        p.space_after = Pt(6)


# --- Slide Builders ---

def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, PRIMARY_BLUE)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(1.8), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(1.0),
                 "District Budget Proposal", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE,
                 alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER, font_name=FONT_HEADER)

    gold_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(5.2), Inches(3.0),
                                       Inches(3.0), Inches(0.04))
    gold_line.fill.solid()
    gold_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD
    gold_line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.3), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(3.0), Inches(0.6),
                 "FY 2025–2026 Annual Operating & Capital Budget", font_size=18, color=RGBColor(0xCC, 0xDD, 0xEE),
                 alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.3), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(3.0), Inches(0.6),
                 "Presented to the Board of Education", font_size=14, color=RGBColor(0xAA, 0xBB, 0xCC),
                 alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(5.2), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(3.0), Inches(0.6),
                 "Prepared by the Office of the Superintendent", font_size=12, color=RGBColor(0x99, 0xAA, 0xBB),
                 alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 1, 9)


def slide_02_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Executive Summary"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.font.size = Pt(28)
            p.font.bold = True
            p.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), "BUDGET OVERVIEW")

    metrics = [
        ("Total Revenue", "$487.2M"),
        ("Total Expenditure", "$462.8M"),
        ("Net Position", "+$24.4M"),
        ("Reserve Ratio", "12.3%"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.5)
    card_h = Inches(1.6)
    gap = Inches(0.2)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 4 * card_w - 3 * gap) / 2

    for idx, (label, value) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = start_x + idx * (card_w + gap)
        y = Inches(1.85)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, card_h, label, value, bg_color=SOFT_BLUE_BG, border_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(3.7), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(2.8),
                 "The proposed budget reflects a balanced approach to maintaining educational quality while addressing fiscal responsibility. Key highlights include a 3.2% increase in revenue driven by property tax reassessment and state funding adjustments, alongside targeted investments in STEM programs, facility modernization, and staff retention initiatives.",
                 font_size=12, color=DARK_GRAY)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.8), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.4),
                 "The district maintains a healthy financial position with reserves exceeding state-mandated minimums and no projected deficit for the upcoming fiscal year.",
                 font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 2, 9)


def slide_03_revenue_sources(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Revenue Sources & Projections"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.font.size = Pt(28)
            p.font.bold = True
            p.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), "REVENUE BREAKDOWN")

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Property Tax", "State Aid", "Federal Grants", "Other Revenue"]
    chart_data.add_series("FY 2025-26", (42, 31, 14, 13))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.7), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.5), chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    chart.legend.font.size = Pt(10)

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = plot.data_labels
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(9)
    data_labels.number_format = "0%"
    data_labels.show_percentage = True
    data_labels.show_value = False

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.8), Inches(1.7), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.5),
                 "Revenue Composition\n\n"
                 "Property Tax (42%)\nStable base revenue with 2.1% increase from reassessment.\n\n"
                 "State Aid (31%)\nIncreased by $8.4M due to formula adjustments.\n\n"
                 "Federal Grants (14%)\nPrimarily Title I and IDEA funding.\n\n"
                 "Other Revenue (13%)\nIncludes fees, investments, and auxiliary services.",
                 font_size=10.5, color=DARK_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 3, 9)


def slide_04_expenditure_breakdown(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Expenditure Breakdown"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.font.size = Pt(28)
            p.font.bold = True
            p.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), "CURRENT VS PROPOSED BUDGET")

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Instruction", "Support Services", "Operations & Maintenance", "Capital Outlay"]
    chart_data.add_series("FY 2024-25 (Current)", (198, 132, 78, 42))
    chart_data.add_series("FY 2025-26 (Proposed)", (210, 138, 82, 58))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.7), Inches(6.0), Inches(4.5), chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    chart.legend.font.size = Pt(10)

    for series in chart.series:
        series.format.fill.solid()
        if "Current" in series.name:
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(0x8B, 0xA4, 0xD3)
        else:
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.2), Inches(1.7), Inches(5.3), Inches(4.5),
                 "Expenditure Highlights\n\n"
                 "Instruction (43%)\nIncreased by $12M for teacher salaries and curriculum.\n\n"
                 "Support Services (30%)\nModest increase for counseling and special education.\n\n"
                 "Operations & Maintenance (18%)\nEnergy efficiency upgrades included.\n\n"
                 "Capital Outlay (9%)\n$58M allocated for facility improvements.",
                 font_size=10.5, color=DARK_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 4, 9)


def slide_05_capital_improvement(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Capital Improvement Plan"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.font.size = Pt(28)
            p.font.bold = True
            p.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), "PROJECTED CAPITAL EXPENDITURES")

    cap_data = [
        ["Project", "Estimated Cost", "Timeline", "Priority"],
        ["Elementary School Roof Replacement", "$4.2M", "Q1–Q2 2025", "High"],
        ["Middle School HVAC Upgrade", "$6.8M", "Q2–Q3 2025", "High"],
        ["High School STEM Lab Renovation", "$8.5M", "Q3 2025–Q1 2026", "Medium"],
        ["District Admin Building Modernization", "$3.1M", "Q4 2025", "Low"],
        ["Athletic Complex Expansion", "$12.4M", "Q1–Q4 2026", "Medium"],
        ["Technology Infrastructure Overhaul", "$9.8M", "Ongoing", "High"],
        ["New Elementary School Construction", "$35.0M", "Q2 2025–Q4 2027", "Critical"],
    ]

    add_table(slide, len(cap_data), 4, cap_data, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.8), Inches(9.0), Inches(3.8))

    add_card(slide, Inches(10.0), Inches(1.8), Inches(2.7), Inches(1.5),
             "Total Capital Budget", "$79.8M", bg_color=SOFT_BLUE_BG, border_color=SECONDARY_TEAL)

    add_card(slide, Inches(10.0), Inches(3.6), Inches(2.7), Inches(1.5),
             "Funding Sources", "General Obligation Bonds (60%), State Grants (25%), Reserves (15%)",
             bg_color=SOFT_BLUE_BG, border_color=SECONDARY_TEAL)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.9), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.8),
                 "Capital projects are prioritized based on facility condition assessments, enrollment projections, and strategic plan alignment.",
                 font_size=10.5, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 5, 9)


def slide_06_key_financial_metrics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Key Financial Metrics"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.font.size = Pt(28)
            p.font.bold = True
            p.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), "FIVE-YEAR FINANCIAL PROJECTIONS")

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["FY 2024", "FY 2025", "FY 2026", "FY 2027", "FY 2028"]
    chart_data.add_series("Revenue ($M)", [452, 468, 487, 501, 518])
    chart_data.add_series("Expenditure ($M)", [438, 449, 463, 475, 488])

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.7), Inches(7.5), Inches(3.5), chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False

    for series in chart.series:
        series.format.fill.solid()
        if "Revenue" in series.name:
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
        else:
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD

    metrics = [
        ("Operating Ratio", "95.0%", SECONDARY_TEAL),
        ("Debt Service Coverage", "2.1x", PRIMARY_BLUE),
        ("Fund Balance", "$62.4M", ACCENT_GOLD),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(3.8)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 3 * card_w - 2 * gap) / 2

    for idx, (label, value, color) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = start_x + idx * (card_w + gap)
        y = Inches(5.45)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, Inches(1.3), label, value, bg_color=SOFT_BLUE_BG, border_color=color)

    add_footer(slide, 6, 9)


def slide_07_strategic_initiatives(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Strategic Initiatives"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.font.size = Pt(28)
            p.font.bold = True
            p.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), "INVESTMENT PRIORITIES")

    initiatives = [
        ("STEM Excellence Program", "$14.2M", "Launch new science labs and coding curriculum across all 18 schools."),
        ("Teacher Retention & Recruitment", "$9.8M", "Competitive salary increases, mentorship programs, and housing stipends."),
        ("Digital Learning Infrastructure", "$7.5M", "One-to-one device deployment and broadband expansion for underserved areas."),
        ("Student Wellness Services", "$6.3M", "Expand counseling staff, mental health resources, and nutrition programs."),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(5.8)
    card_h = Inches(1.2)
    gap_y = Inches(0.15)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - card_w) / 2

    for idx, (title_text, budget, desc) in enumerate(initiatives):
        y = Inches(1.85) + idx * (card_h + gap_y)
        add_card(slide, start_x, y, card_w, card_h, title_text, f"{budget} — {desc}", bg_color=SOFT_BLUE_BG, border_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)

    add_footer(slide, 7, 9)


def slide_08_risk_assessment(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Risk Assessment & Mitigation"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.font.size = Pt(28)
            p.font.bold = True
            p.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), "FINANCIAL RISK MATRIX")

    risk_data = [
        ["Risk Category", "Likelihood", "Impact", "Mitigation Strategy"],
        ["Revenue Shortfall", "Low", "High", "Diversified revenue base; contingency reserve of $24M."],
        ["Enrollment Decline", "Medium", "Medium", "Targeted outreach programs; flexible staffing model."],
        ["State Funding Cuts", "Low", "High", "Active advocacy; alternative funding partnerships."],
        ["Construction Cost Overruns", "Medium", "Medium", "Fixed-price contracts; 10% contingency in capital budget."],
        ["Staffing Shortages", "High", "Medium", "Competitive compensation; pipeline programs with universities."],
    ]

    add_table(slide, len(risk_data), 4, risk_data, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.8), Inches(12.0), Inches(3.5))

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.5), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(1.0),
                 "The district maintains a comprehensive risk management framework with quarterly reviews by the Finance Committee and annual audits by independent firms.",
                 font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 8, 9)


def slide_09_conclusion(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Conclusion & Next Steps"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.font.size = Pt(28)
            p.font.bold = True
            p.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), "PATH FORWARD")

    next_steps = [
        "Board review and public hearing scheduled for June 15, 2025",
        "Adopt final budget at July board meeting",
        "Communicate approved budget to district stakeholders by August 1",
        "Begin fiscal year implementation with quarterly progress reports",
    ]

    add_numbered_list(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.9), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(1.6), Inches(2.5), next_steps, font_size=14)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(4.7), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(1.6), Inches(0.5),
                 "We appreciate the Board's continued commitment to fiscal stewardship and educational excellence.",
                 font_size=13, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_card(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(5.4), Inches(9.3), Inches(1.6),
             "Contact Information",
             "Office of the Superintendent  |  superintendent@district.edu  |  (555) 867-5309\n"
             "Budget Office  |  budget@district.edu  |  (555) 867-5310",
             bg_color=SOFT_BLUE_BG, border_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)

    add_footer(slide, 9, 9)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_executive_summary(prs)
    slide_03_revenue_sources(prs)
    slide_04_expenditure_breakdown(prs)
    slide_05_capital_improvement(prs)
    slide_06_key_financial_metrics(prs)
    slide_07_strategic_initiatives(prs)
    slide_08_risk_assessment(prs)
    slide_09_conclusion(prs)

    prs.save("District_Budget.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
